overall.description: A third-person view from a video game showing a robed character standing still at a wooden balcony overlooking a vast, candle-lit gothic library interior. The scene features detailed wooden architecture, towering bookshelves, and warm ambient lighting with no significant movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library balcony overlooking book stacks

agents.ego_description: standing motionless at the wooden balcony, looking down into the library atrium

entered.detail: ornate carved wooden railing at the edge of the upper floor balcony
floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves filled with books lining the right wall
large pointed arch window opening revealing the lower library levels
wrought iron spiral staircase descending to the lower floor visible through the arch
lit candle chandelier hanging from the ceiling illuminating the space
thick wooden columns framing the balcony opening

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless at a wooden balcony overlooking a vast gothic library interior. Warm candlelight from hanging chandeliers illuminates the multi-level space, with tall bookshelves visible to the right and a spiral staircase seen through the central archway. The scene remains completely static throughout the segment with no movement or environmental changes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a vast gothic library, preserving a sense of stillness and warmth throughout. It begins with a view of a robed character standing motionless on a wooden balcony, overlooking the expansive multi-level interior. As the camera lingers, the warm glow of hanging chandeliers illuminates the surrounding space, highlighting the towering bookshelves to the right. The perspective then settles on the central archway, where a spiral staircase is visible in the distance. The scene remains completely static, holding this singular, candle-lit composition without any environmental shift.
